review: Constantly freezes and crashes. Clearing the cache doesn't help. Can't log out because it isn't responsive at all. Uninstalling doesn't always fix it either.

The app isn't working. I can't log in and it can't find restaurants near me. I have a fairly new phone as well so there is literally no reason for this. This occurred after sending negative feedback to a restaurant location that was constantly shorting me on food items and happy meal toys or collectors items. I'm going to assume the location made a false report of abuse and I've been blocked because of an managers involvement in theft from customers.

This app needs a LOT of work. I can't begin to tell you the amount of times I've left the app to answer a text or check something only to come back and it's a white screen, or it loses order, or the app doesn't load, or it gets stuck loading, then loses my order, order comes back and then when I leave the app because I need to drive to the location and reopen the app to enter the curbside number, can't do it nowhere to press to bring my order back up.
You can see offers options, but it doesn’t exists when you download it. I don’t need a app and being track to order.
